section.heading: Rules of construction
section.chapeau: Nothing in this chapter may be construed to—

paragraph.content: authorize any officer or employee of an agency to request the disclosure of information described under subparagraphs (B) and (C) of section 9201(4); or
create a private right of action for any person.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 116–92, div. A, title XI, § 1122(a), Dec. 20, 2019, 133 Stat. 1607.)
